source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: [Street scene. Seward, Alaska, 1906]
description: 1906 street scene in early Seward showing a muddy main street with wooden storefronts, telegraph poles, and the frontier town atmosphere that characterized the original gateway to Alaska's interior before the railroad was completed.
alt: 1906 street scene in Seward, Alaska showing muddy main street with wooden storefronts and telegraph poles
